title: Refute progress digest clearance claims
prompt: Challenge whether the new test or report output could be mistaken for completion, buyer proof, Supabase clearance, branch approval, production approval, deploy, or hosted/live parity.
summary: Refuted clearance over-claims for the progress digest unit-contract phase.
evidence: Focused checks assert blocked launch status and report boundaries; manifest snapshot shows launch=blocked, completion audit status=blocked with 9 completed, 5 blocked, 1 manual, total 15, and has_unit_contract=true only as a unit/test evidence marker. No staged rename, branches, Supabase, buyer evidence, production approval, deploy, live services, or secrets were mutated.

title: Synthesize phase result
prompt: Summarize changed files, checks, residual blockers, untouched staged rename, and next safe adjustment without claiming launch completion.
summary: Synthesized progress digest unit-contract phase with blocked launch status preserved.
evidence: Changed files are limited to focused progress digest unit test, manifest/checker contracts, launchEvidenceManifest unit expectations, and dynamic backlog state. Checks passed: node --check for touched scripts, progress digest report markdown/json, progress digest checker, launch evidence manifest checker, commercial launch readiness checker, focused Vitest 2 files/17 tests, pnpm exec tsc -b --pretty false, and git diff --check. Next safe adjustment remains external-evidence or proof-boundary work; no live launch blocker was cleared.
